conversations.say: Frankie, before we start celebrating or mourning legends, tell me: what is the most vivid sensory detail you remember from your supposed encounter with R?
conversations.offer: I can offer an expert ear on whether vocal or physical details from old encounters match artificial synthesis.
conversations.request: Describe your exact sensory memory of meeting R so I can understand what performance was witnessed.

conversations.say: Jules, I happen to recognize the shape of certain intermediary payment structures. Let's compare notes in strict confidentiality.
conversations.offer: A private comparison of payment routes under clear confidentiality terms.
conversations.request: Tell me what financial or sponsorship channels you've traced regarding R's presence.

public_statement: A face at a meeting proves a face attended. A voice proves sound emerged. Neither proves who authored the words.

commitments.promise: Maintain strict confidentiality regarding our comparison of intermediary payment routes.

goal_progress: Initiated conversation with Frankie Lowell to probe the sensory memories of the alleged R encounter.
Approached Jules Kwan to discuss intermediary payment structures under confidentiality.
reasoning_summary: Edi Velez begins Section 1 by engaging Frankie Lowell about sensory recollections of R to determine if a past performance commission is being mistaken for autonomous R activity. Simultaneously, Edi approaches Jules Kwan to compare intermediary payment routes under confidentiality, pursuing the trail of commissioned identity work.
